Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,596,916Details

Worldwide Box Office $42,797,679

Total $26,653,951

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $60,776,474

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2005 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: March 7th, 2006 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content including some dialogue.
Running Time: 95 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fat Suit, Prologue
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Singers, You Can't Go Home Again

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
